items.title: If jobs fire people to replace them with AI, how will people make money to keep buying things? Wouldn’t the economy collapse because people arent buying anything anymore?
items.title_en: If jobs fire people to replace them with AI, how will people make money to keep buying things? Wouldn’t the economy collapse because people arent buying anything anymore?
items.title_zh: 如果工作解雇人们并用人工智能取代他们，人们将如何赚钱来继续购买东西？经济不会因为人们不再购买任何东西而崩溃吗？
